# Anosim

**Summary**: A statistical test to determine if the differences between groups are significant.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] used ANOSIM analysis with Bray Curtis similarity index to test difference between sites.

## Key Results and Findings

- All localities were significantly different (p<0.05) except for inner and middle lagoons. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 51]])
